title: ZENO Cotton Floor Mop 150CM | Mop with 2 Ultra Absorbent Heads & Metal Pole Handle | Mops for Cleaning Floors, Kitchen, Office, Bedroom | Easy Twist & Lock Assembly | Ultra Absorbent Cotton Head
features: STRONG METAL HANDLE - The 150cm durable metal handle offers excellent reach, control and lasting strength during daily cleaning. It stays firm under pressure and resists bending, making floor cleaning easier and more efficient.

2X ULTRA ABSORBENT MOP HEADS - Comes with two thick cotton mop heads designed to soak up spills fast and lift dust, dirt and grime with minimal effort. Great for hard floors in kitchens, bathrooms, offices and bedrooms.

ULTRA EASY TWIST AND LOCK DESIGN - Changing mop heads is quick with the secure twist and lock system. It fastens tightly and won’t loosen during use, saving time and avoiding interruptions while you clean multiple rooms in one go.

COMFORTABLE NON SLIP GRIP - Designed with a built-in grip section that helps prevent slipping and hand fatigue. Whether dry or wet, it gives you control and comfort for long cleaning sessions on all types of hard flooring.

SUITABLE FOR ALL FLOOR TYPES - Safe to use on tile, laminate, vinyl and wooden floors without scratching or damage. This mop is ideal for homes, offices or shops where quick, daily cleaning of spills and dirt is a must.
